approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities as potential hedged items, which makes the recognised intragroup dividend receivable conceptually part of the fair value hedge model set.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 separately recognises highly probable forecast transactions as hedged items, so the cash flow hedge model is a peer hedge-accounting approach relevant to foreign-currency intragroup exposures.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 21 and IFRIC 16 specifically address foreign-currency exposures connected with net investments in foreign operations, making net investment hedge a distinct peer IFRS hedge model for this issue set.
